task: I’m helping a younger kid make a simple plan for what to do if a storm starts while we’re outside at school. Can you turn it into something I could read out loud to a class?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a simple class-ready version you can read out loud:

**If a storm starts while we are outside, we should stop playing right away and listen to the teacher. We should walk quickly and calmly to the safe place. We should stay with our class and follow directions. We should not run, shout, or go anywhere by ourselves. When the teacher says it is safe, then we can go back to normal.**

If you want, I can make it even shorter and more kid-like.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. It’s simple enough to read out loud, and it sounds like something a class would actually understand.
